other_observers: On Feb 10, 2005, seen by Mark Peterson and Kara Lewantowicz.; Found by Brandon Percival, Mark Peterson, Kara Lewantowicz on Feb 10, 2005 and seen again by Brandon Percival on Feb 18, 2005.
specific_location: Pueblo Reservoir and Arkansas River, below Pueblo Reservoir dam.
description: A gull smaller than the nearby Ring-billed Gulls, with dark eyes, darker gray mantle, and an all yellow small bill. Photo taken and submitted.Behaviors: The bird was observed at Pueblo Reservoir on Feb 10th, 2005 and then along the Arkansas River, below Pueblo Reservoir dam on Feb 18, 2005 (photo taken at that time).Call: nonePlumage: adult winter
